title: The Lost Angels
wikitext:
[]: The "Lost Angels"             Quote Post by Iblis 19th Angel » Mon Jul 18, 2005 5:35 am Hello. First time poster here at the Eva Monkey forums. Good to be here, nice to meet you all, yadda yadda yadda, on with the show... What I was wondering is; does anybody here know about the two Lost Angels from the Eva RPG book mentioned in the bonus section of volume 8 (or was it 7?) of the manga? All I know about them is their names: Iblis (from whom I took my name, obviously), & Baraqijal (I'm almost positive I spelled that wrong). I know that Iblis is the Islamic equivalent of Satan, but I know nothing about the other guy. The name sounds vaguely Middle Eastern, so I'm betting he's from the Qua'ran, too. Anybody know what they look like? What their powers are? And then there's another thing... [url]http://www.realitylapse.com/viewimage/evangelion/wallpapers/62.jpg[/url] This freak looks nothing at all like any of the Angels in the show. Is this one of the RPG Angels? If so, which one? Where can I find pictures of the other? This has been bugging me for a while now.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Mon Jul 18, 2005 10:12 am Yeah, they're from the Quran. According to "The Heights" 7:21, Iblis tempts Adam in Eden. Baraqijal is like the angel of God's lightning or something. They're in the book RPG like you said. I've never known about that picture. It could be Iblis or Baraqijal or maybe just concept art.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 18, 2005 10:18 am I'd be intrested to know if this RPG is worth my time. Also if it mentions what Rei is the angel of i'd love to know that too.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 18, 2005 11:04 am See here: http://animenation.net/forums/showthread.php?t=172901&page=2&pp=15 The angel in that illo you posted is the Diemay Angel: http://animenation.net/forums/showpost.php?p=4262783&postcount=3

[]:             Quote Post by Iblis 19th Angel » Mon Jul 18, 2005 6:02 pm Reichu wrote: See here: http://animenation.net/forums/showthread.php?t=172901&page=2&pp=15 The angel in that illo you posted is the Diemay Angel: http://animenation.net/forums/showpost.php?p=4262783&postcount=3

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Mon Jul 18, 2005 7:23 pm Ugh. That's what that Maria broad looks like? What a disapointing design. And here I had my hopes up and all... She's even worse than stupid Mana. (Who herself looks like nothing more than a half-assed mix of Rei and Yui.) Nicholaiev however looks like a badass.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 18, 2005 7:33 pm what is this electric type that you speak of? the pokemon?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 18, 2005 8:07 pm Mr. Bud wrote: And here I had my hopes up and all... She's even worse than stupid Mana. (Who herself looks like nothing more than a half-assed mix of Rei and Yui.)

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 18, 2005 8:41 pm Reichu wrote: Mixing Rei and Yui? Isn't that sort of, er, redundant?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Mon Jul 18, 2005 9:29 pm Reichu wrote: While I agree in some respects, I generally think that female anime/manga characters that aren't fap material are commendable achievements. Then again... I'm sure Maria could be fap material, too, with just the right treatment...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 18, 2005 9:51 pm Mr. Bud wrote: And as for Rei and Yui, not really in my opinion. I mean, Rei isn't just a strait up clone of Yui. She has Lilith in her too.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Tue Jul 19, 2005 4:03 am Reichu wrote: Mr. Bud wrote: And as for Rei and Yui, not really in my opinion. I mean, Rei isn't just a strait up clone of Yui. She has Lilith in her too.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Tue Jul 19, 2005 12:34 pm Ryo wrote: Reichu wrote: Mr. Bud wrote: And as for Rei and Yui, not really in my opinion. I mean, Rei isn't just a strait up clone of Yui. She has Lilith in her too.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Tue Jul 19, 2005 4:35 pm Well, that was the point.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Tue Jul 19, 2005 5:17 pm Ryo wrote: Well, that was the point.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Jul 19, 2005 6:44 pm what happened with gazdakka?

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Tue Jul 19, 2005 7:14 pm sadsadshinji wrote: what happened with gazdakka?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Jul 19, 2005 8:06 pm He's also a passively-aggressive militant defender of the dub. Any statement of flaw is met with, "Well, everyone has an opinion, so STFU." It's not a creature to be missed.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Tue Jul 19, 2005 8:15 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: He's also a passively-aggressive militant defender of the dub. Any statement of flaw is met with, "Well, everyone has an opinion, so STFU."

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Jul 20, 2005 2:08 pm hmmm i knew him from another forum, and he seems pretty nice of a guy
